text.title: Dormant Lead Reactivation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step quarterly procedure to draft + execute a reactivation sequence per segment.

step.name: segment
step.action: Classify each contact as past-client, lost-proposal, or nurture-lead. Drop contacts marked "do not contact".

step.name: score-and-prioritize
step.input: Segments + prior interaction notes + consent metadata
step.action: Per contact: score 1-5 based on prior project size, time since last contact, reciprocity. Drop scores ≤ 2.

step.name: draft-sequence-per-segment
step.action: Draft a 3-touch sequence per segment. Touch 1 = re-engagement reference; touch 2 = specific value offer; touch 3 = polite close. Apply consent-reconfirm rule per contact.
step.decision-gate: If any touch fails references_prior_interaction, redraft.

step.name: send-touch-1
step.action: Send touch 1 only. Wait 7-10 days for responses before drafting touch 2.

step.name: record-outcomes
step.action: Record outcome per contact after each touch. End-of-quarter sweep: pending → killed; engaged → pipeline.
